rationale: Educ. Code §11.0581 governs joint election dates for school district trustees. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions or property tax appraised values, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change creates no conflict.
quote: An election for trustees of an independent school district shall be held on the same date as:
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns election scheduling and expense allocation, not tax exemptions or appraised value.
